displayTitle: Darth Vader: Path of the Dark Side
synopsis: Discover the villain Darth Vader, the mysterious Sith Lord in black armor: Watch as Vader fights rebel soldiers with his red lightsaber, meets Jedi Knight Luke Skywalker, and bows to the Emperor of the evil Empire. Plus, learn fun facts about X-wings, TIE fighters, and more!
title: Darth Vader: Path of the Dark Side
